controls.label: Quantity
controls.notes: Used for per-part break pricing (floor) and program totals. Put first so pricing updates immediately.

controls.label: Variant
controls.notes: Internal variant key maps 1:1 to Sidekick production specs and Sidekick Fulfillment SKU blocks.

controls.label: Header
controls.notes: If Yes, adds tabbed header production part (KK260018-01).

controls.label: Number of Shelves / Pegs
controls.notes: Linear piece pricing: per-unit shelf/hook price × count. Built-in shelves variants keep this field but production pricing is a $0 placeholder until additional-shelf pricing is defined.

controls.label: Printed Inside
controls.notes: Not priced yet for Sidekick (no-op placeholders).

controls.label: Shipper
controls.notes: If Yes, adds the shipper production part for the selected variant. Also gates Pack Out fulfillment in Turnkey.

controls.label: Assembly
controls.notes: KDF: production only. Turnkey: adds Sidekick Fulfillment costs (assemble, pack-out, insert/dividers or hooks, product fill).

controls.label: Product Touches
controls.notes: Turnkey-only: drives Product Fill fulfillment using add-down pricing (cap=20; beyond cap repeats last adder).

controls.label: Product Weight
controls.notes: If oz is selected, unit weight is converted to pounds for total lbs.

controls.label: Unit Weight — Value
controls.notes: Numeric value of unit weight; paired with the selected unit (oz/lb).

controls.label: Complexity
controls.notes: Selects the markup cell in the 3×3 matrix (same convention as PDQ).

fulfill-insert-dividers-fixed2-KK260017.label: Fulfillment — Assemble Insert & Dividers (KK260017) — fixed count=2

fulfill-insert-dividers-fixed4-KK260016.label: Fulfillment — Assemble Insert & Dividers (KK260016) — fixed count=4
